modules.module_title: Introduction to Professional Cleaning & Personal Grooming
Cleaning Chemicals, Tools, Equipment & Safety Precautions
Room-by-Room Cleaning Techniques (Bedroom, Living Room, Kitchen)
Bathroom Cleaning, Sanitization, Disinfection & Odor Control
Special Surfaces Care (Wood, Marble, Glass) & Waste Management
Professional Ethics, Client Communication & Cleaning Services Business

questions.question: Professional House Cleaner (peshavar ghar ki safai karmi) ka primary objective kya hota hai?

options.A: Ghar ke sabhi rooms ko hygienic, dust-free aur clean maintain karna, safety aur organization standards ke sath
options.B: Only washing client cars and gardening
options.D: Prescribing sanitizing medicine to family members

questions.explanation: Professional cleaner ka mukhya uddeshya client ke residential premises ko systematic techniques se germs-free aur organized banana hota hai.

questions.question: Cleaning chemicals usage safety me, kis chemical mixture combination ko dangerous poisonous gas release ke karan strictly ban kiya jata hai?

options.A: Bleach and Ammonia (releases toxic chloramine gas fumes)
options.D: Dish soap and plain tap water

questions.explanation: Bleach aur ammonia ko mix karne se highly toxic chloramine gas produce hoti hai jo severe respiratory burns aur asphyxiation cause karti hai.

questions.question: Cross-contamination (keetanuon ka aapas me phailna) prevent karne ke liye cleaning micro-fiber cloths checks me kya standard check follow hota hai?

options.A: Color-coding system (jaise red cloth strictly for toilet, blue for glass, yellow for kitchen)
options.B: Using single cotton cloth for entire house cleaning from toilet to kitchen table
options.C: Using newspapers sheets everywhere without cloths

questions.explanation: Color coding toilet path bacteria (E. coli) ko dining table ya kitchen slabs me spread hone se protect karti hai, keeping high safety hygiene standards.

questions.question: Polished Marble floor cleaning me kis type ke cleaning agents use karne chahiye surface damage se bachne ke liye?

options.A: Neutral pH cleaners (avoiding acidic vinegar, lemon or harsh acid toilet cleaners)

questions.explanation: Marble calcium carbonate base hota hai. Acidic substances (ph below 7) surface enamel ko etch (jala dena) karte hain, jisse marble shine permanently dull ho jati hai.

questions.question: Vacuum cleaning machine efficiency maintain karne ke liye use karne se pehle primary checklist kya hai?

options.A: Check filter clean status, empty dust bags regularly aur roller brushes ke hair/treads ko remove karna
options.C: Washing electric motor with running tap water

questions.explanation: Block filters and overfilled dust bags motor suction power drop karte hain aur motor burn out risks create karte hain.

questions.question: Toilet bowl cleaning steps me chemical apply karne ke baad brush scrubbing se pehle waiting time kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Allows disinfectant chemical contact time to kill stubborn pathogens and dissolve hard water scaling
options.B: Waiting changes chemical color to red
options.C: To dry toilet bowl surfaces completely before brushing

questions.explanation: Disinfectant compounds (like sodium hypochlorite) ko micro-organisms protein cell wall break karne ke liye minimum contact dwell time (often 5-10 mins) chahiye hota hai.

questions.question: House ceiling cleaning (chath safai) and cobwebs (makdi ke jaale) clearing kis stage par honi chahiye room cleaning cycle me?

options.A: First step (top-to-bottom rule - chath ki dust bottom furniture par giregi jise baad me clean kiya ja sake)
options.B: Last step after floor mopping is completed

questions.explanation: Top-to-bottom rule ensure karta hai ki high elevation dust falling down clean carpet par na gire, eliminating duplicate mopping works.

questions.question: Cleaning chemicals container safety label me 'Safety Data Sheet (SDS)' kya information deta hai?

options.A: First aid steps, hazards warnings, safe handling protocols and storage precautions for chemical users

questions.explanation: SDS document industrial health compliance checks ke liye mandatory hai jo skin contact accidents me immediate medical response lines guides karta hai.

questions.question: Glass window cleaning (shishe ki safai) me streaks (lakeeren) prevent karne ke liye clean wiping techniques me kya use hota hai?

options.A: Squeegee tool using continuous single-direction overlapping strokes, wiped with dry microfiber cloth corner
options.B: Wiping glass with circular movements using wet soap sponges
options.C: Drying with kitchen tissue papers sheets soaked in oil

questions.explanation: Squeegee blade liquids ko skin-sweep surface tension drop se clear karta hai, circular wipes dirt ko surface par smear karti hain.

questions.question: Professional cleaner ethics checks me client room safai ke dauran agar personal expensive jewelries floor par milein to kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Keep item on safe prominent place (like vanity table top) and immediately notify client about its location
options.B: Hide item in personal bag until client asks
options.C: Throw item directly inside trash bins with dust

questions.explanation: Absolute honesty and reporting integrity are pillars of professional domestic helper trust relations.

questions.question: Kitchen deep cleaning me stove gas top grease marks (tel ke chipchipe nishaan) cutting me kis category ke cleaning chemicals use hote hain?

options.A: Alkaline degreasers (shariye chemicals which emulsify fats/grease)

questions.explanation: Grease and organic oil layers are acidic. High alkaline surfactants (ph 9-11) break oil molecular chains, converting grease to washable soaps.

questions.question: Cleaner safety checklist 'PPE' (Personal Protective Equipment) basic components?

options.A: Rubber gloves, nose masks, non-slip footwear and safety goggles (during chemical sprays)

questions.explanation: PPE protects cleaning worker lungs and skin from abrasive chemicals dermatitis and airborne dust allergies.

questions.question: Carpet stain removal check 'Blotting technique' vs 'Scrubbing' why scrubbing is avoided on fresh stains?

options.A: Scrubbing spreads stain deep into carpet backing fiber roots and ruins pile textures

questions.explanation: Fresh stains must be blotted gently using dry absorbent towel edges to soak liquid up, avoiding spreading.

questions.question: Eco-friendly cleaning choices me 'Baking Soda' (sodium bicarbonate) chemical properties use why it is popular?

options.A: Mild abrasive scrubber and natural odor absorber (safe for food contact surfaces like refrigerators)

questions.explanation: Baking soda is soft alkaline base, safe to scrub delicate enamel sinks without scratching while neutralizing acid odors.

questions.question: Professional cleaning service pricing setups 'Square Footage billing' how it is calculated?

options.A: Charging client flat rate base on total floor area size (eg Rs 5 per sq ft of cleaning zone)
options.B: Charging base on weight of total garbage bags collected
options.C: Charging only matching competitor name alphabetically

questions.explanation: Square footage rates standardize pricing estimates, securing clear quotes for office and residential clients.

questions.question: Wood furniture polishing checks why silicone-based sprays should be restricted on antique wood?

options.A: Silicone creates hard moisture-resistant barrier that darkens wood finishes and prevents future re-staining repairs
options.C: Silicone is extremely toxic to touch

questions.explanation: Silicone oils soak wood crevices, creating greasy residues that resist fresh polyurethane varnish bonds.

questions.question: Kitchen deep cleaning checks 'Sinks garbage disposals sanitizing' what kitchen waste helps reduce odor?

options.A: Grinding raw lemon peels with ice cubes (acid neutralizes smell, ice scrubs blades)
options.B: Pouring boiling fat grease down disposal

questions.explanation: Citric oils deodorize disposal chambers, while ice impacts clear slime coating on blades.

questions.question: Dry vacuum bags replacements checks when should bag be replaced to prevent motor strains?

options.A: When bag is 2/3 full (restricting airflow and heating motor)
options.B: Only when bag explodes open inside vacuum cabinet

questions.explanation: Exceeding 2/3 volume fills filter pores, dropping vacuum pressure and risking engine overheating.

questions.question: Hardwood floors safety checks why standing puddle water is strictly forbidden on wood?

options.A: Water swells wood fibers, warping joints and causing board buckling
options.B: Water changes wood color to bright blue
options.C: Water evaporates and rusts ceiling fans

questions.explanation: Wood porous cells absorb humidity, buckling seam joins. Floors require damp-mop techniques only.

questions.question: Domestic helper business contracts 'Initial Walkthrough checklist' what is the administrative objective?

options.A: Identifies pre-existing damages (cracked glass, stained rugs) before start of contract, protecting against false claims
options.C: Measures total water pressure inside bathrooms

questions.explanation: Initial walkthrough checklists log current home states, preventing legal disputes over pre-existing wall cracks/damages.

options.A: Silicone creates hard moisture-resistant barrier that darkens wood finishes and prevents future re-staining repairs
options.C: Silicone is extremely toxic to touch

options.C: Water evaporates and rusts ceiling fans

questions.explanation: Wood porous cells absorb humidity, buckling seam joins. Floors require damp-mop techniques only.

questions.question: Domestic helper walkthrough checklists?

options.A: Identifies pre-existing damages (cracked glass, stained rugs) before start of contract, protecting against false claims
options.C: Measures total water pressure inside bathrooms

questions.explanation: Initial walkthrough checklists log current home states, preventing legal disputes over pre-existing wall cracks/damages.

questions.question: Sanitization protocols checks 'Contact Dwell time' what does it mean?

options.A: Length of time disinfectant chemical must remain visibly wet on surface to kill target pathogens
options.B: Total time taken by worker to clean one room

questions.explanation: Simply spraying and wiping immediately does not kill germs; surfaces must stay wet with cleaner for specified time (usually 3-10 minutes).

questions.question: Rust stain removal from bathroom fixtures what acid is safe to use?

options.A: Oxalic acid or Citric acid based cleaners (dissolves iron oxide stains safely)
options.C: Baking soda mixed with soap only

questions.explanation: Mild organic acids dissolve rusty iron precipitates without etching porcelain finishes or damaging steel pipe fittings.

questions.question: High dusting safety checks what tool is recommended to clean ceiling fans without ladder risks?

options.A: Extensible pole duster with static-charged fibers or blade-sleeve socks
options.C: Throwing wet towels over fan blades

questions.explanation: Extensible dusters allow high-reach cleans while keeping worker feet safely on floor, avoiding falls.

questions.question: Waste management protocols checks where 'Chemical containers empty bottles' are disposed?

options.A: Rinsed and placed inside plastic recyclables bin, following local hazardous materials guidelines
options.C: Thrown inside organic food waste bins

questions.explanation: Chemical bottles must be empty and rinsed before plastic recycling bins, preventing chemical leaks into soils.

questions.question: Cleaner service operations 'Work order sheets' why details tasks are checked off?

options.A: Confirms completion of specific room tasks, acts as work invoice validation, and controls quality tracking

questions.explanation: Structured checkoff lists keep cleaner routines aligned, verifying contracted targets are fully met.

questions.question: Sanitization contact dwell time?

options.A: Length of time disinfectant chemical must remain visibly wet on surface to kill target pathogens
options.B: Total time taken by worker to clean one room

questions.explanation: Simply spraying and wiping immediately does not kill germs; surfaces must stay wet with cleaner for specified time (usually 3-10 minutes).

options.C: Baking soda mixed with soap only

questions.explanation: Mild organic acids dissolve rusty iron precipitates without etching porcelain finishes or damaging steel pipe fittings.

options.A: Extensible pole duster with static-charged fibers or blade-sleeve socks
options.C: Throwing wet towels over fan blades

questions.explanation: Extensible dusters allow high-reach cleans while keeping worker feet safely on floor, avoiding falls.

options.C: Thrown inside organic food waste bins

questions.question: Cleaner service work sheets?

options.A: Confirms completion of specific room tasks, acts as work invoice validation, and controls quality tracking

questions.explanation: Structured checkoff lists keep cleaner routines aligned, verifying contracted targets are fully met.

questions.question: Special surfaces care 'Unsealed Terracotta floor tiles' why standard acid cleaners are avoided?

options.A: Porous terracotta absorbs acid deeply, causing clay disintegration and surface powdering
options.C: Clay surfaces explode under neutral pH

questions.explanation: Terracotta is soft porous clay. Harsh acid washes break clay bonds, leaving white salt patches (efflorescence) and surface crumble.

questions.question: Eco cleaning methods 'White vinegar' why it helps clear hard water shower buildup?

options.A: Acetic acid in vinegar reacts with calcium carbonate scale, dissolving mineral crusts safely
options.B: Vinegar thickens water to slide away

questions.explanation: Acidic vinegar reacts with alkaline calcium chalk crusts, turning them into soluble acetates that wash off easily.

questions.question: Bathroom sanitizing 'Tile grout lines mildew' what chemical removes black fungal spots?

options.A: Sodium hypochlorite (chlorine bleach based sprays, kills mold and bleaches stain white)

questions.explanation: Mildew is living fungus. Bleach releases chlorine, breaking fungal spores and disinfecting porous grout joins.

questions.question: Grooming and etiquette why professional clean uniforms are essential for cleaners?

options.A: Presents hygiene confidence to clients, identifies brand credentials and protects personal clothes

questions.explanation: Branded clean uniforms build employee identity and validate service professionalism, establishing client trust margins.

questions.question: Cleaner client feedback channels 'Follow up quality questionnaire' what does it measure?

options.A: Tracks client satisfaction, identifies missed clean spots and monitors staff reliability ratings

questions.explanation: Proactive quality calls address client gaps early, improving client retention loops.

options.C: Clay surfaces explode under neutral pH

questions.explanation: Terracotta is soft porous clay. Harsh acid washes break clay bonds, leaving white salt patches (efflorescence) and surface crumble.

questions.question: Cleaner client feedback?

options.A: Tracks client satisfaction, identifies missed clean spots and monitors staff reliability ratings

questions.question: Bathroom cleaning 'Hard water spots on chrome faucets' how to polish safely?

options.A: Wipe with vinegar damp cloth, rinse with water and buff dry with clean microfiber towel
options.B: Scrub chrome with coarse wire steel wool

questions.explanation: Acid vinegar dissolves calcium spots, while microfiber polishing buffs metal without scratching chrome platings.

questions.question: Cleaner safety 'Ergonomics of mopping' how to prevent back strain?

options.A: Keep mop handle close to body, stand straight and swing mop side-to-side using leg hips movements (avoiding back bending)
options.B: Bend back fully forward and push mop head with shoulders force
options.C: Mop floors using short kneeling positions

questions.explanation: Keeping mop handle close and using body weight hips pivot reduces lumbar strain, saving lower back muscles.

questions.question: Dust mite allergen controls 'Bedding wash rules' what wash water temp kills dust mites?

options.A: 130 F (54 C) or higher (hot wash cycles)

questions.explanation: Dust mites are microscopic arachnids. Washing sheets at 130 F denatures mite proteins, killing them and washing allergens away.

questions.question: Stainless steel appliances cleaning checks what is the standard wiping direction?

options.A: Wipe in direction of metal grain lines (prevents surface scratch halos and smearing)
options.B: Wipe in tight circular rubbing loops always
options.D: No grain direction exists on steel

questions.explanation: Steel surfaces have microscopic grain grooves. Wiping cross-grain traps dirt and forms scratch marks, following grains guarantees clean buffs.

questions.question: Cleaner business operations 'Supply packing checklist' why items are logged before leaving office?

options.A: Ensures all cleaner supplies (cleaners, towels, spray bottles) are packed, avoiding delays at client houses
options.B: Reports total inventory to local tax officers

questions.explanation: Loading dock checks ensure teams have correct chemicals and color cloths, safeguarding efficient on-site operations.

questions.question: Bathroom faucets chrome vinegar?

options.A: Wipe with vinegar damp cloth, rinse with water and buff dry with clean microfiber towel
options.B: Scrub chrome with coarse wire steel wool

questions.explanation: Acid vinegar dissolves calcium spots, while microfiber polishing buffs metal without scratching chrome platings.

questions.question: Cleaner mopping ergonomics back?

options.A: Keep mop handle close to body, stand straight and swing mop side-to-side using leg hips movements (avoiding back bending)
options.B: Bend back fully forward and push mop head with shoulders force
options.C: Mop floors using short kneeling positions

questions.explanation: Keeping mop handle close and using body weight hips pivot reduces lumbar strain, saving lower back muscles.

options.A: 130 F (54 C) or higher (hot wash cycles)

questions.explanation: Dust mites are microscopic arachnids. Washing sheets at 130 F denatures mite proteins, killing them and washing allergens away.

options.D: No grain direction exists on steel

questions.question: Granite kitchen countertops care why ammonia-based window sprays are restricted on granite?

options.A: Ammonia strips protective granite sealer, making stone porous and vulnerable to food stains
options.C: Ammonia smells too sweet inside kitchens

questions.explanation: Ammonia strips off resin sealants, leaving stone pores vulnerable to oil, wine, and food acid staining.

questions.question: Window blind cleaning checks what is the fastest dusting technique for wooden blinds?

options.A: Close blinds flat, wipe with dry microfiber, rotate slats, and wipe other side (avoiding cleaning slat-by-slat)
options.B: Wash blinds with direct water hose spraying
options.C: Use vacuum brush on open slats separately for hours

questions.explanation: Closing slats flat allows cleaning full blind surface area quickly, saving massive minutes per room.

questions.question: Bathroom odor controls checks why dry sink traps (P-traps) cause bathroom smells?

options.A: Evaporated water seals allow sewer gases to rise up drain pipes directly into room
options.B: Dry traps build mold crusts fast

questions.explanation: P-trap water curves seal sewer gases from rising. Pouring cup water down dry guest sinks blocks smell routes.

questions.question: Cleaning service tools 'HEPA filter vacuums' whyHEPA filters are mandatory for allergy homes?

options.A: Traps 99.97% of micro-particles (pollen, pet dander, mite dust) preventing them exiting vacuum exhaust
options.C: HEPA filters never clog or require washing

questions.explanation: Generic filters leak fine dust particles back into air, HEPA mesh traps microscopic allergens, keeping indoor air clean.

questions.question: Etiquette checks 'Handling client keys' what is the safest tracking code method?

options.A: Tag keys with unique random number code (never write client name/address on key tag itself)
options.B: Write full client address and door number on tag
options.C: Keep keys inside vehicle glove compartment unlocked

questions.explanation: If coded keys are lost, third parties cannot link them to target properties, protecting client home safety.

questions.question: Granite care ammonia strip?

options.A: Ammonia strips protective granite sealer, making stone porous and vulnerable to food stains
options.C: Ammonia smells too sweet inside kitchens

questions.explanation: Ammonia strips off resin sealants, leaving stone pores vulnerable to oil, wine, and food acid staining.

options.B: Wash blinds with direct water hose spraying
options.C: Use vacuum brush on open slats separately for hours

questions.explanation: Closing slats flat allows cleaning full blind surface area quickly, saving massive minutes per room.

questions.question: Floor care checks 'Vacuuming rug fringes' how to vacuum tasseled margins safely?

options.A: Vacuum from center outward, disengaging roller brushes at fringe edges to prevent threads entanglement
options.B: Run high power beater brushes directly over fringes back and forth

questions.explanation: Spinning roller brushes snag loose cotton tassels, pulling threads out and tearing carpet borders.

questions.question: Bathroom cleaning 'Glass shower door water haze' what eco acids remove soap scum?

options.A: Lemon juice or warm vinegar spray (dissolves insoluble calcium soaps)

questions.explanation: Soap scums are calcium salts of fatty acids. Mild citric/acetic acids dissolve salt bonds, restoring glass clarity.

questions.question: Clean safety 'Chemical storage locks' why kept away from furnace rooms?

options.A: Heat triggers chemical vapor pressure builds, risking bottle leaks or ignition of solvent aerosols
options.B: Furnace dust damages chemical bottle labels

questions.explanation: Volatile solvents and aerosol cans hold flammable propellents, requiring cool dry ventilation locks.

questions.question: Polishing chemistry 'Stainless steel wipes' what happens if oil is sprayed too thick?

options.A: Attracts dust, pet hair, and displays dark smudges upon light fingertip contacts
options.B: Steel rusts instantly under thick oil layers
options.C: Oil evaporates in five seconds anyway

questions.explanation: Thick polish deposits act as dust magnets. Polishing requires micro sprays and thorough microfiber dry wipes.

questions.question: House cleaner business 'Work injury coverage' why worker compensation insurance is active?

options.A: Covers worker medical bills if they fall off step-stools or slip on wet tile floors during clean runs

questions.explanation: Cleaning runs carry high slip slip injury hazards. Compensation policies secure employee care and protect business assets.

questions.question: Vacuum rug fringes brush?

options.A: Vacuum from center outward, disengaging roller brushes at fringe edges to prevent threads entanglement
options.B: Run high power beater brushes directly over fringes back and forth

questions.explanation: Spinning roller brushes snag loose cotton tassels, pulling threads out and tearing carpet borders.

questions.question: Bathroom shower door scum?

options.A: Lemon juice or warm vinegar spray (dissolves insoluble calcium soaps)

questions.explanation: Soap scums are calcium salts of fatty acids. Mild citric/acetic acids dissolve salt bonds, restoring glass clarity.

options.A: Heat triggers chemical vapor pressure builds, risking bottle leaks or ignition of solvent aerosols
options.B: Furnace dust damages chemical bottle labels

questions.explanation: Volatile solvents and aerosol cans hold flammable propellents, requiring cool dry ventilation locks.

questions.question: Steel polish dust magnets?

options.A: Attracts dust, pet hair, and displays dark smudges upon light fingertip contacts
options.B: Steel rusts instantly under thick oil layers
options.C: Oil evaporates in five seconds anyway

questions.explanation: Thick polish deposits act as dust magnets. Polishing requires micro sprays and thorough microfiber dry wipes.

questions.question: House cleaner work injury?

options.A: Covers worker medical bills if they fall off step-stools or slip on wet tile floors during clean runs

questions.explanation: Cleaning runs carry high slip slip injury hazards. Compensation policies secure employee care and protect business assets.

questions.question: Professional House Cleaner final launch audits why safety compliance checking is key final step?

options.A: Ensures all non-toxic chemical setups, PPE gears and color code cloths are aligned to deliver safe cleanings

questions.explanation: Confirming compliance parameters protects helper health while providing pristine sanitization margins for clients.

questions.question: Cleaner safety bleach ammonia toxic mix?

options.A: Bleach and Ammonia (releases toxic chloramine gas fumes)
options.D: Dish soap and plain tap water

questions.explanation: Bleach aur ammonia ko mix karne se highly toxic chloramine gas produce hoti hai jo severe respiratory burns aur asphyxiation cause karti hai.

questions.question: Color coding microfibers cross contamination?

options.A: Color-coding system (jaise red cloth strictly for toilet, blue for glass, yellow for kitchen)
options.B: Using single cotton cloth for entire house cleaning from toilet to kitchen table
options.C: Using newspapers sheets everywhere without cloths

questions.explanation: Color coding toilet path bacteria (E. coli) ko dining table ya kitchen slabs me spread hone se protect karti hai, keeping high safety hygiene standards.

questions.question: Polished Marble neutral cleaners rules?

options.A: Neutral pH cleaners (avoiding acidic vinegar, lemon or harsh acid toilet cleaners)

questions.explanation: Marble calcium carbonate base hota hai. Acidic substances (ph below 7) surface enamel ko etch (jala dena) karte hain, jisse marble shine permanently dull ho jati hai.

questions.question: Vacuum checks roller brush cleaning?

options.A: Check filter clean status, empty dust bags regularly aur roller brushes ke hair/treads ko remove karna
options.C: Washing electric motor with running tap water

questions.explanation: Block filters and overfilled dust bags motor suction power drop karte hain aur motor burn out risks create karte hain.

questions.question: Disinfectant contact time toilet bowl?

options.A: Allows disinfectant chemical contact time to kill stubborn pathogens and dissolve hard water scaling
options.B: Waiting changes chemical color to red
options.C: To dry toilet bowl surfaces completely before brushing

questions.explanation: Disinfectant compounds (like sodium hypochlorite) ko micro-organisms protein cell wall break karne ke liye minimum contact dwell time (often 5-10 mins) chahiye hota hai.

questions.question: Top to bottom room cleaning sequences?

options.A: First step (top-to-bottom rule - chath ki dust bottom furniture par giregi jise baad me clean kiya ja sake)
options.B: Last step after floor mopping is completed

questions.explanation: Top-to-bottom rule ensure karta hai ki high elevation dust falling down clean carpet par na gire, eliminating duplicate mopping works.

questions.question: Safety Data Sheets chemicals information?

options.A: First aid steps, hazards warnings, safe handling protocols and storage precautions for chemical users

questions.explanation: SDS document industrial health compliance checks ke liye mandatory hai jo skin contact accidents me immediate medical response lines guides karta hai.

questions.question: Glass window streaks squeegee overlap?

options.A: Squeegee tool using continuous single-direction overlapping strokes, wiped with dry microfiber cloth corner
options.B: Wiping glass with circular movements using wet soap sponges
options.C: Drying with kitchen tissue papers sheets soaked in oil

questions.explanation: Squeegee blade liquids ko skin-sweep surface tension drop se clear karta hai, circular wipes dirt ko surface par smear karti hain.

questions.question: Cleaner ethics client items honesty?

options.A: Keep item on safe prominent place (like vanity table top) and immediately notify client about its location
options.B: Hide item in personal bag until client asks
options.C: Throw item directly inside trash bins with dust

questions.explanation: Absolute honesty and reporting integrity are pillars of professional domestic helper trust relations.
